since_last: 33% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.11%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 33% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -2.10% · Gold -1.10% · Nasdaq100 -0.99%. 33% of 85 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.11%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.11%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.31%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SPCX is the standout at -8.57%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +7.55%, VRT +6.97%, AMAT +5.57%, SMR +5.46%, MRVL +5.39%. Laggards: SPCX -8.57%, SNAP -7.76%, APP -5.99%, AI -5.76%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -8.57% at $193.27
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -8.57% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
